headline: Can Specialty Momentum Push CAH's Earnings Growth Beyond 25% in FY26?
summary: CAH expects specialty revenues to top $50B in FY26 as its expanding MSO and biopharma services ecosystem helps drive projected EPS growth of 23-26%.
